claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: "Spellbook is the most complete AI suite for commercial legal work, trusted by more than 4,400 in-house teams and law firms worldwide."

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to the pricing page is available on the homepage under the 'Resources' section.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The homepage includes a link to the 'Help Center' which typically contains documentation accessible without login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Spellbook works with trusted consultants, IT firms, MSPs, and legal tech professionals who help law firms & in-house legal counsels modernize the way they work.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: We ensure data privacy with Zero Data Retention agreements, preventing data use for training.
